Video.summary: Carl Reiner and Melba Moore guest star on this episode.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Carl Reiner, Melba Moore

Video.summary: Robert Goulet, Rich Little & Pat Carroll guest. Rich impresses while Robert & Pat join "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little

Image.alt: Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little

Video.summary: Guest Tim Conway breaks up Harvey in "The Dentist." Also: Carol looks to steal the show from a Broadway star.
Video.title: Ethel Merman, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Ruth Buzzi and Richard Crenna take part in a salute to the "bad girls" of cinema.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Ruth Buzzi, Richard Crenna

Video.summary: Guest Neil Sedaka joins the gang for a set of commercial parodies.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Neil Sedaka

Video.summary: Michele Lee headlines a wonderful production number, which also offers a visit with the 10th Street Family.
Video.title: Michele Lee

Video.summary: Sketches include an encounter at a bar between Harvey & Carol, and Carol & Vicki as "Lucky Lady" contestants.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest Jack Weston matches with Carol on a computer date, Carol sings, and Harvey plays Dr. Jekyll.
Video.title: Jack Weston

Video.summary: Sketches include: "The West Dakota County Fair", "War Is Heck", and another visit with "The Old Folks."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Wayne Rogers, Buddy Ebsen

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell guest stars! He plays a member of "The Family." Also: movie spoof "The Lady Heir."
Video.title: Roddy McDowell

Video.summary: The cast of "The Carol Burnett Show" revisits some of their favorite moments from the show.
Video.title: The Carol Burnett Show: Show Stoppers

Image.alt: The Carol Burnett Show: Show Stoppers
The Carol Burnett Show: Show Stoppers

Video.summary: Among this evening's sketches: "Th Wonderful World Of Prisons", and Carol as "Mrs. Invisible Man."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Barbara Eden, Jonathan Winters

Video.summary: Guest John Byner plays both a villain and a trial witness. On "Carol & Sis", The Bradfords join a group.
Video.title: John Byner

Video.summary: Cass Elliot and Pat Paulsen star. Pat looks at "How To Be A Sensuous Female" and Cass joins 10th Avenue.
Video.title: Cass Elliot, Pat Paulsen

Video.summary: Spoofs of classic movies abound, including "Ninotchka", "Blackboard Jungle", "Gone With The Wind", and more.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Chita Rivera, Bob Newhart

Video.summary: Paul Lynde plays a smarmy insurance salesman, and later appears on "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Dyan Cannon, Paul Lynde

Video.summary: Shecky Greene & Eydie Gorme join for a rundown of TV programs. Also: "Carol & Sis" & "Ironstreet & Wife."
Video.title: Eydie Gorme, Shecky Greene

Video.summary: Martha Raye and Betty Grable guest in the soap opera spoof "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Martha Raye, Betty Grable

Video.summary: Guests Nancy Wilson and Nanette Fabray are here for tonight's "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Includes mother Carol offering daughter Vicki some advice on the way to the altar, and Tim as a handyman.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Anthony Newley & Bernadette Peters guest. Featuring The Invisible Man's mother and a man who can get anything.
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Anthony Newley

Video.summary: Tim Conway and Ruth Buzzi guest, with Buzzi as Chris' friend in "Carol & Sis", and Tim and Carol as survivors.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Ruth Buzzi

Video.summary: Imogene Coca joins Carol, while Harvey and Carol interview with Miss America and the parody "Bonnie And Clod."
Video.title: Imogene Coca

Video.summary: Hal Linden takes a leave from the 12th Precinct to cut it up with Carol & company!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Hal Linden

Video.summary: Phil Silvers & Jean Stapleton guest! Features "The Old Folks", commercial parodies, and a musical number.
Video.title: Phil Silvers, Jean Stapleton

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence plays an unsuccessful comic. Also: commercial spoofs; Tim at war, attempting to fire a cannon.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Jack Gilford guests. Gilford plays a man whose life is transformed by a hat and drops in on "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Jack Gilford

Video.summary: Guest Martha Raye drags Carol to The Tomcat Club. Also featured: "Carol & Sis" and "The Old Folks."
Video.title: Martha Raye

Video.summary: Guest Gloria Swanson arrives for the Q&A...but she only has eyes for Lyle.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Gloria Swanson

Video.summary: Michele Lee and Flip Wilson dazzle with song and stand-up comedy, and Carol vamps in "V.I.P." as Mae East.
Video.title: Michele Lee, Flip Wilson

Video.summary: Rock Hudson and Nancy Walker join Carol and company for sketch entitled: "When My Baby Laughs At Me."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Rock Hudson, Nancy Walker

Video.summary: Tonight's episode features a take-off of the classic Elizabeth Taylor film "National Velvet".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Jack Palance guests, appearing in a gangster sketch. Carol and Roger meet Chris' new beau in "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Jack Palance
